data.title: Cloud-Based Infrastructure
data.description: Microsoft's website is built on their Azure cloud platform, offering scalability and resilience.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Azure services like Virtual Machines, Blob Storage, and Azure CDN.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Employs microservices to enhance modularity and manageability of services.
data.technical_spec: Deployed with Azure Kubernetes Service for container orchestration.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Website implements responsive design to ensure compatibility with various devices.
data.technical_spec: Uses CSS Grid and Flexbox with media queries for adaptive layouts.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Globally distributed CDN to improve load times and content delivery.
data.technical_spec: Azure CDN integrated with caching strategies.

data.title: API-Driven Content
data.description: Content is delivered via RESTful APIs for dynamic interactions.
data.technical_spec: Built with .NET Core and API management in Azure.
